title: E-signatures
subtitle: 21 CFR Part 11 signatures: signer, meaning, reason, content hash, time — immutable

sign.title: Electronic signature
sign.passwordHint: Part 11 requires re-entering your password to sign

needApprovedToComplete: An approved e-signature on this run is required before completion
complianceDesc: Before transitioning to "completed", this run must carry an approved e-signature (21 CFR Part 11 §11.200, re-authenticate password when signing).
